headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -17.0)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 45% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 110 quotes, including 78 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious grievances today.

• Despite the high quote count, frustrations dropped significantly from yesterday's peak of 69.2, settling in the middle of the typical range.

• Both fears and optimism remain subdued with negative scores, though optimism improved slightly from yesterday.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
